active_goal: Productize the existing Phase 1 frontend interaction layer without product-scope expansion, new top-level menus, production deployment, or production cutover.
last_summary: DEV-023 productized the existing Phase 1 frontend interaction layer: dashboard/workbench rows and notifications can jump to related project/task/contract/approval/AI draft objects; project, task, chat, knowledge, contract, approval and settings detail views expose relationship jumps and selection-first context; LAN local delivery scripts and README instructions were added. The writer executor produced the diff but did not return a terminal report, so the verifier reran the full local gate. npm ci, lint, typecheck, test, build, smoke:api and audit passed. Web/API LAN services were started on 0.0.0.0; local HTTP checks passed. Browser opened the web app successfully; text input automation was limited by the Browser plugin virtual clipboard, while API smoke covered login and object-flow behavior.

browser_verification.command: browser verification against the web app
browser_verification.result: Web opened at http://127.0.0.1:3011 and LAN service advertised http://192.168.2.90:3011; API health passed at http://127.0.0.1:3002. Browser plugin text input failed because virtual clipboard is unavailable; login/object flows are covered by API smoke.

next_recommended_task: Open PR for DEV-023, pass GitHub required checks and review gate, then keep LAN test server available for user acceptance; do not cut over production until signed release window.
